debug_info.goal:
case inr
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
inst✝⁶ : Fintype ι
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
E : ι → Type u_3
inst✝⁵ : (i : ι) → NormedAddCommGroup (E i)
inst✝⁴ : (i : ι) → NormedSpace ℝ (E i)
inst✝³ : (i : ι) → MeasurableSpace (E i)
inst✝² : ∀ (i : ι), CompleteSpace (E i)
inst✝¹ : ∀ (i : ι), BorelSpace (E i)
inst✝ : ∀ (i : ι), SecondCountableTopology (E i)
X : (i : ι) → Ω → E i
h : ∀ (i : ι), HasGaussianLaw (X i) P
hX : iIndepFun X P
this : IsProbabilityMeasure P
hι : Nonempty ι
⊢ ∃ m f,
    f.toBilinForm.IsPosSemidef ∧
      ∀ (L : StrongDual ℝ ((x : ι) → E x)),
        charFunDual (Measure.map (fun ω x => X x ω) P) L = exp (↑(L m) * I - ↑((f L) L) / 2)

failed_attempts:
exact ⟨fun i ↦ P[X i], ⟨CovarianceBilin P (fun ω i ↦ X i ω) / 2, 
      CovarianceBilin.half_isPosSemidef P _, fun L ↦ by
        simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.div_apply]
        rw [(h default).charFunDual_eq]
        sorry⟩⟩

obtain ⟨m, f, hf, hchar⟩ := (h hι.some).isGaussian_map.gaussian_charFunDual
    refine ⟨fun i => (h i).isGaussian_map.mean, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
    all_goals sorry

simp only [charFunDual_gaussian]
    rw [← exp_sum]
    congr 1
    simp [sum_sub_distrib]

exact ⟨fun i ↦ (h i).isGaussian_map.mean,
      ∑ i, (h i).isGaussian_map.covarianceForm.comp (proj ℝ _ i).toDual (proj ℝ _ i),
      BilinForm.isPosSemidef_sum _ (fun i _ ↦ (h i).isGaussian_map.covarianceForm_posSemidef.comp _),
      fun L ↦ by
        simp only [sum_apply]
        rw [hX.charFunDual_eq_prod]
        simp only [IsGaussian.charFunDual_eq (h _).isGaussian_map]
        rw [← exp_sum]
        congr 1
        simp only [proj_apply, toDual_apply, comp_apply]
        ring⟩

refine ⟨fun i ↦ P[X i], (∑ i, covarianceBilin (P.map (X i))).toContinuousLinearMap, ?_, ?_⟩
    · exact BilinForm.isPosSemidef_sum _ fun i _ ↦ (h i).isGaussian_map.covarianceBilin_isPosSemidef
    · intro L
      simp only [BilinForm.sum_apply, BilinForm.toContinuousLinearMap_apply]
      have hind := hX.charFunDual_prod_eq_prod_charFunDual
      rw [hind]
      simp_rw [(h _).isGaussian_map.charFunDual_eq']
      rw [← exp_sum]
      congr 1
      simp [mul_comm I, sub_eq_add_neg, sum_add_distrib, ← sum_neg_distrib]

exact ⟨fun i ↦ P[X i], (IsGaussian.sum_covarianceBilin fun i ↦ (h i).isGaussian_map),
      (IsGaussian.sum_covarianceBilin_isPosSemidef fun i ↦ (h i).isGaussian_map),
      fun L ↦ hX.charFunDual_eq_prod h L⟩

exact ⟨fun i ↦ (h i).isGaussian_map.mean, 
          (IsGaussian.sum_indep h hX).covarianceOperator, 
          (IsGaussian.sum_indep h hX).covarianceOperator_isPosSemidef,
          fun L ↦ (IsGaussian.sum_indep h hX).charFunDual_eq L⟩
